final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: interior-design-visualization
Asset type: commercial interior design concept, wide-angle architectural shot
Primary request: industrial-style café interior with exposed concrete walls, metal piping, vintage leather sofas, and black-and-white photography on walls
Scene/backdrop: spacious café interior with raw concrete walls, visible metal ductwork and pipes along ceiling, large floor-to-ceiling windows
Subject: vintage brown leather Chesterfield sofas and armchairs, reclaimed wood tables, industrial pendant lights, curated black-and-white photography gallery wall
Style/medium: architectural interior photography, industrial loft aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide-angle establishing shot, 24mm lens, capturing full seating area and window wall
Lighting/mood: abundant natural daylight streaming through large windows, soft shadows, warm and inviting yet rugged atmosphere
Color palette: raw concrete gray + warm brown leather + matte black metal + warm wood tones + neutral cream accents
Materials/textures: rough exposed concrete, aged leather with patina, brushed steel pipes, reclaimed wood grain, matte black metal fixtures
Constraints: maintain industrial rawness while preserving sophisticated ambiance, keep natural light as dominant light source
Avoid: overly polished surfaces, colorful distractions, modern plastic furniture, cluttered composition, artificial lighting overpowering natural light
